document.title: Financing Extension Catalog — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2
document.description: Enriched catalog of all financing extension models for LAWIM_V2 — covering financing requests, product catalog, provider model, eligibility rules, applicant financial profiles, guarantees, contributions, repayment capacity, document requirements, financing matching, and decision tracking. LAWIM facilitates the match between demandeurs and financing products without replacing the financier.

financing_types.description: 12 financing types supported by the platform, covering real estate and property-related financing needs

values.description: Standard mortgage for purchasing a residential property
Financing for constructing a new residential property
Financing for property renovation, extension, or improvement
Unsecured personal loan for real estate-related expenses
Leasing or credit-bail for equipment, vehicles, or property
Financing for investment properties (rental, buy-to-let, commercial)
Short-term phased financing for construction projects
Short-term bridge financing between transactions
Additional financing on an existing property
Subsidized financing for social and affordable housing
Commercial real estate financing for business purposes
Small-scale housing microfinance for low-income applicants

provider_types.description: 8 types of financing providers supported by the platform

values.label: Banque
values.description: Commercial bank regulated by the central bank (COBAC/BEAC)

values.label: Microfinance (EMF/MFI)
values.description: Microfinance institution offering small-scale loans

values.label: Coopérative d'Épargne et de Crédit
values.description: Member-owned cooperative credit union

values.label: Compagnie d'Assurance
values.description: Insurance company offering policy-backed loans and investment products

values.label: Agence Gouvernementale
values.description: Government housing finance agency offering subsidized loans

values.label: Fintech / Prêteur Digital
values.description: Digital lending platform offering fast, online financing

values.label: Prêteur Privé
values.description: Private individual or company offering short-term financing

values.label: Société Coopérative
values.description: Member-based cooperative offering housing loans to members

eligibility_rule_categories.description: 11 eligibility rule categories covering all common financing product constraints

values.label: Revenu
values.description: Minimum income thresholds and income source requirements
example_rules: Income source verifiable via payslip or bank statement

values.label: Emploi
values.description: Employment type, stability, and business age requirements

values.label: Âge
values.description: Minimum and maximum age requirements at application and maturity

values.label: Résidence
values.description: Residency status and permit requirements
example_rules: Valid residency permit required for non-nationals

values.label: Nationalité
values.description: Nationality eligibility for specific products

values.label: Score de Crédit
values.description: Credit score minimums and credit history requirements
example_rules: No history of default in past 5 years

values.label: Ratio d'Endettement
values.description: Maximum debt-to-income ratio for loan qualification

values.label: Ratio Prêt-Valeur
values.description: Maximum loan-to-value ratio based on appraisal

values.label: Apport Personnel
values.description: Minimum down payment and contribution requirements

values.label: Garantie
values.description: Collateral type, value, and encumbrance requirements
example_rules: Collateral not encumbered by prior charges

values.label: Géographique
values.description: Geographic availability and property location constraints
example_rules: Property city in eligible cities list

repayment_capacity_thresholds.description: Repayment capacity scoring thresholds used in capacity calculation

dti_ratio.description: Debt-to-Income Ratio thresholds for capacity classification

document_requirements_matrix.description: Document requirements matrix defining mandatory (M), conditional (C), and not required (—) documents per financing type

decision_reason_codes.description: Standardized decision reason codes for financing decisions, organized by category

reasons.label_fr: Revenu mensuel inférieur au minimum requis
Ratio d'endettement dépasse le maximum autorisé
Score de crédit inférieur au minimum requis
Titre foncier non valide ou grevé
Garant ne répond pas aux critères

match_scoring_algorithm.description: Financing match scoring algorithm weighting and component definitions
match_scoring_algorithm.formula: match_score = eligibility_weight * eligibility_score + capacity_weight * capacity_score + product_fit_weight * product_fit_score + preference_weight * preference_score

components.name: product_fit
components.description: Composite fit score based on amount match, term match, and rate competitiveness

sub_components.name: rate_competitiveness
sub_components.method: inverse of interest_rate position within market range

components.name: preference
components.description: Match against demandeur's explicitly stated preferences

extensions.source_concept: Financing Request entity — demandeur's application for financing
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no financing request concept. Financing intent is captured only as part of Project qualification without dedicated financing request entity, status tracking, or provider-facing workflow.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create FinancingRequest entity: id (UUID), user_id (UUID), project_id (UUID?), financing_type (Enum: 12 types), purpose_description (Text), requested_amount (Decimal), currency (String default XAF), preferred_term_months (Int?), preferred_interest_rate (Decimal?), monthly_payment_capacity (Decimal?), has_existing_loans (Boolean), existing_loan_total (Decimal?), urgency (Enum: low|medium|high|urgent), status (Enum: draft|submitted|matching|matched|documents_pending|documents_submitted|under_review|approved|rejected|withdrawn|funded|closed), readiness_score (Float?), submitted_at (DateTime?), matched_at (DateTime?), funded_at (DateTime?), closed_at (DateTime?), created_at (DateTime). Each request represents a demandeur's need for financing. Links to User (applicant), Project (property being financed), ApplicantFinancialProfile (financial situation), Guarantee (collateral), Contribution (down payment), FinancingMatch (match attempts), and FinancingDecision (provider decisions). LAWIM does not replace the financier — it facilitates the match between demandeur and provider.
required_states: FinancingRequest.status ∈ {draft, submitted, matching, matched, documents_pending, documents_submitted, under_review, approved, rejected, withdrawn, funded, closed}
extensions.human_decision_question: Financing types: 12 types as specified (FINANCING_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §3.2) or subset for MVP (e.g., mortgage_buy + mortgage_construction + personal_loan + microfinance_loan)?

extensions.source_concept: Financing Product catalog — searchable, comparable loan products
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no financing product catalog. No mechanism to list, compare, or match loan products from multiple providers.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create FinancingProduct entity: id (UUID), provider_id (UUID), product_code (String unique), product_name (JSON multilingual), description (JSON multilingual), financing_type (Enum), is_active (Boolean), min_amount (Decimal), max_amount (Decimal), currency (String), min_term_months (Int), max_term_months (Int), interest_rate_type (Enum: fixed|variable|mixed|tiered), interest_rate_min (Decimal), interest_rate_max (Decimal), effective_apr (Decimal?), processing_fee_percentage (Decimal?), processing_fee_fixed (Decimal?), insurance_required (Boolean), insurance_rate (Decimal?), collateral_required (Boolean), collateral_type (Enum[]?), guarantor_required (Boolean), min_guarantors (Int?), max_funding_time_days (Int), prepayment_allowed (Boolean), prepayment_fee (Decimal?), target_market (Enum[]: individual|professional|enterprise|diaspora|civil_servant|student), geographic_availability (String[]), featured (Boolean), featured_until (DateTime?), created_at (DateTime), updated_at (DateTime). Plus matching attributes: min_income_monthly, max_debt_to_income_ratio, min_contribution_percentage, max_loan_to_value_ratio, min_age, max_age, employment_type_accepted[], min_years_in_business, nationality_required[], residency_required, min_credit_score. Products are searchable by financing_type, amount, term, and geographic availability.
required_permissions: FIN: manage products (provider admin, platform admin)
extensions.human_decision_question: Financing product matching attributes: include all 16 matching attributes as specified in FINANCING_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §3.3 or subset for initial MVP (income, DTI, LTV, contribution, collateral)?

extensions.source_concept: Financing Provider model — banks, microfinance, and other lenders
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no financing provider model. Financial institutions are not registered on the platform and their products, commissions, and integrations are not managed.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create FinancingProvider entity: id (UUID), provider_type (Enum: bank|microfinance|credit_union|insurance_company|government_agency|fintech|private_lender|cooperative), provider_name (String), provider_code (String), registration_number (String?), license_number (String?), regulatory_body (String?), country (String default CM), headquarters_address (String?), contact_phone (String?), contact_email (String?), website (String?), logo_url (String?), description (Text?), years_in_operation (Int?), total_branches (Int?), coverage_cities (String[]), is_verified (Boolean), verification_status (Enum: unverified|pending|verified|suspended), commission_model (Enum: fixed_per_loan|percentage_of_loan|success_fee|subscription), commission_rate (Decimal?), integration_type (Enum: api|manual_email|manual_portal|paper_based), integration_status (Enum: not_connected|active|degraded|disconnected), api_endpoint (String?), api_key_last_rotated (DateTime?), contact_person_name (String?), contact_person_email (String?), contact_person_phone (String?), sla_response_days (Int default 5), max_concurrent_applications (Int?), monthly_application_limit (Int?), is_active (Boolean), activated_at (DateTime?), created_at (DateTime). Providers offer products, have eligibility rules, and receive financing applications through the platform. Commission is earned by LAWIM upon successful funding.
extensions.human_decision_question: Provider types: all 8 types as specified (FINANCING_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §4.3) or initial focus on banks and microfinance institutions only?

extensions.source_concept: Eligibility rules engine — hard and soft constraints for financing products
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no eligibility rules engine. Financing matching cannot evaluate applicant qualifications against product requirements.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create EligibilityRule entity: id (UUID), product_id (UUID?), provider_id (UUID?), rule_code (String unique), rule_name (String), rule_type (Enum: income|employment|age|residency|nationality|credit_score|dti_ratio|ltv_ratio|contribution|collateral|guarantor|business_age|documentation|geographic), operator (Enum: greater_than|greater_than_or_equal|less_than|less_than_or_equal|equal|not_equal|in|not_in|between|contains|matches_all|matches_any|custom_function), value (JSON), unit (String?), error_message (JSON multilingual), severity (Enum: hard_block|soft_warning|info), priority (Int), is_active (Boolean), effective_from (DateTime), effective_until (DateTime?), created_at (DateTime). Rules organized by categories (11 categories in §5.2). Evaluation flow: 1) Identify candidate products by financing_type match, 2) Geographic filter, 3) Target market filter, 4) Evaluate hard_block rules (any fail = product excluded), 5) Evaluate soft_warning rules (flagged but still eligible), 6) Score and rank eligible products.
required_permissions: FIN: read eligibility rules (all authenticated users)
FIN: manage rules (provider admin, platform admin)
extensions.human_decision_question: Eligibility rule severity: binary (hard_block only) or three-tier (hard_block + soft_warning + info) as specified? Three-tier provides better user experience by showing demandeurs why they nearly qualify.

extensions.source_concept: Applicant Financial Profile — comprehensive financial data collection
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no financial profile concept. Applicant income, expenses, assets, and liabilities are not captured in a structured format for financing evaluation.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create ApplicantFinancialProfile entity: id (UUID), financing_request_id (UUID), employment_status (Enum: civil_servant|private_sector_employee|self_employed|business_owner|freelancer|retiree|student|unemployed|homemaker), employer_name (String?), employer_sector (Enum: public|private|ngos|international|informal), job_title (String?), years_at_current_job (Decimal?), monthly_income (Decimal), income_currency (String default XAF), income_sources (JSON[]), additional_income (Decimal?), additional_income_description (String?), monthly_expenses (Decimal), expense_breakdown (JSON?), existing_loan_payments (Decimal?), total_assets (Decimal?), asset_breakdown (JSON?), total_liabilities (Decimal?), liability_breakdown (JSON?), has_bank_account (Boolean), bank_name (String?), account_type (Enum: checking|savings|both), years_banking (Decimal?), has_credit_history (Boolean), credit_score (Int?), credit_score_source (String?), has_mobile_money (Boolean), mobile_money_provider (String?), is_verified (Boolean), verification_method (Enum: self_declared|payslip|bank_statement|tax_return|employer_letter|account_aggregator), verified_at (DateTime?), verified_by (UUID?), created_at (DateTime), updated_at (DateTime). 6 verification methods with trust levels from Low (self_declared) to High (account_aggregator). Financial profile is used for eligibility evaluation, repayment capacity calculation, and match scoring.
required_permissions: FIN: create/update own financial profile (demandeur self)
FIN: read financial profile (demandeur self, admin, provider upon submission)
extensions.human_decision_question: Financial profile verification: 6 verification methods as specified (self_declared to account_aggregator) or simplified (self_declared + payslip + bank_statement only) for MVP?

extensions.source_concept: Guarantee and Contribution tracking — collateral and down payment management
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no guarantee or contribution tracking. Collateral and down payment information is not captured as structured data.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create Guarantee entity: id (UUID), financing_request_id (UUID), guarantee_type (Enum: property_mortgage|land_deed|bank_guarantee|personal_guarantee|corporate_guarantee|life_insurance|savings_account_lien|securities_collateral|vehicle_title|equipment_lien|guarantee_fund), description (Text), estimated_value (Decimal), value_currency (String), valuation_method (Enum: appraisal|market_estimate|tax_value|self_declared), appraisal_document_url (String?), owner_name (String), owner_relationship (Enum: self|spouse|parent|sibling|business_partner|third_party), is_encumbered (Boolean), existing_charges (Decimal?), net_equity (Decimal?), status (Enum: offered|verified|accepted|rejected|released), verification_status (Enum: unverified|pending|verified|rejected), verified_by (UUID?), verified_at (DateTime?), document_url (String?), notes (Text?), created_at (DateTime). Create Contribution entity: id (UUID), financing_request_id (UUID), contribution_type (Enum: cash_down_payment|existing_property_equity|land_contribution|material_contribution|labor_contribution|government_subsidy|employer_assistance|family_contribution|cooperative_contribution), description (Text), amount (Decimal), currency (String), percentage_of_total (Float?), source_description (Text?), source_verification (Enum: unverified|bank_statement|sale_agreement|gift_letter|subsidy_letter|payroll_deduction), availability_date (DateTime?), is_committed (Boolean), commitment_proof_url (String?), status (Enum: planned|committed|verified|received|refunded), created_at (DateTime). Rules: minimum contribution % by product, contribution source verification over 10M XAF, multiple guarantees allowed, guarantee substitution permitted.

extensions.source_concept: Repayment Capacity calculation — DTI-based affordability analysis
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no repayment capacity calculation. Cannot determine whether an applicant can afford a proposed loan based on their financial profile.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create RepaymentCapacity entity: id (UUID), financing_request_id (UUID), monthly_net_income (Decimal computed), monthly_expenses (Decimal), existing_loan_payments (Decimal), disposable_income (Decimal), proposed_monthly_payment (Decimal?), dti_ratio (Float computed), max_affordable_monthly_payment (Decimal), max_affordable_loan_amount (Decimal), ltv_ratio (Float?), repayment_capacity_score (Enum: excellent|good|fair|weak|insufficient), score_thresholds (JSON), used_dti_threshold (Float default 0.40), used_interest_rate (Decimal), used_term_months (Int), calculated_at (DateTime), notes (Text?). Formula: repayment_capacity = monthly_net_income - monthly_expenses - existing_loan_payments; DTI = (existing_loan_payments + proposed_monthly_payment) / monthly_net_income; max_affordable_loan = PV(monthly_net_income * max_dti - existing_loan_payments, term, rate). Scoring: excellent (DTI ≤ 20%), good (21-30%), fair (31-40%), weak (41-50%), insufficient (> 50%). LTV = loan_amount / property_appraised_value. Calculation triggers when financial profile is updated or a match is proposed.
required_permissions: FIN: read repayment capacity (demandeur self, admin, provider upon submission)
extensions.human_decision_question: DTI thresholds for capacity scoring: Gold defaults (excellent ≤20%, good 21-30%, fair 31-40%, weak 41-50%, insufficient >50%) — accept or adjust for African market context where informal income is more common?

extensions.source_concept: Document requirements per financing type — mandatory and conditional document lists
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no financing document management. Required documents for loan applications are not defined, tracked, or validated.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create DocumentRequirement: id (UUID), product_id (UUID?), financing_type (Enum?), document_code (String unique), document_name (JSON multilingual), description (JSON multilingual), category (Enum: identity|income|employment|property|legal|financial|guarantee|business|personal), requirement_level (Enum: mandatory|conditional|recommended), condition_expression (JSON?), accepts_alternatives (Boolean), alternative_document_codes (String[]?), max_age_months (Int?), requires_notarization (Boolean), requires_translation (Boolean), accepted_formats (String[] default [pdf, jpg, png]), max_file_size_mb (Int default 10), is_active (Boolean), sort_order (Int), created_at (DateTime). Create DocumentSubmission: id (UUID), financing_request_id (UUID), document_requirement_id (UUID), document_url (String), document_hash (String SHA-256), file_type (String), file_size_bytes (Int), status (Enum: pending|uploaded|validated|rejected|expired), uploaded_at (DateTime), validated_by (UUID?), validated_at (DateTime?), rejection_reason (Text?), is_alternative (Boolean), alternative_for_code (String?), expires_at (DateTime?), notes (Text?). 20 document types defined with mandatory/conditional/- matrix per financing type (§9.2). Document submission triggers validation workflow.
required_permissions: FIN: read document status (demandeur self, admin, provider)
extensions.human_decision_question: Document matrix: 20 document types with Mandatory/Conditional/Not Required per 6 financing types as specified in FINANCING_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §9.2 — confirm matrix or adjust per market/regulatory requirements?

extensions.source_concept: Financing Match — demandeur to product matching with scoring
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no financing match concept. No mechanism to match financing requests with products, score compatibility, or track match lifecycle.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create FinancingMatch entity: id (UUID), financing_request_id (UUID), product_id (UUID), provider_id (UUID), match_type (Enum: auto|manual|demandeur_selected|agent_selected), match_score (Float? 0.0-1.0), eligibility_result (Enum: eligible|conditionally_eligible|ineligible), eligibility_details (JSON), failed_rules (JSON[]), warnings (JSON[]), proposed_amount (Decimal), proposed_term_months (Int), proposed_interest_rate (Decimal), proposed_monthly_payment (Decimal), total_cost_of_credit (Decimal), effective_apr (Decimal), status (Enum: pending|selected|submitted|in_progress|successful|unsuccessful|expired), selected_at (DateTime?), submitted_to_provider_at (DateTime?), provider_responded_at (DateTime?), expires_at (DateTime?), notes (Text?), created_at (DateTime). Match scoring algorithm: eligibility_weight (0.50) + capacity_weight (0.25) + product_fit_weight (0.15) + preference_weight (0.10). Match lifecycle: eligibility check → match created → presented → selected → dossier preparation → submitted to provider → provider review → decision. LAWIM facilitates the match; the provider makes the decision.
required_permissions: FIN: read matches (demandeur self, admin, provider for own products)
required_states: FinancingMatch.status ∈ {pending, selected, submitted, in_progress, successful, unsuccessful, expired}
extensions.human_decision_question: Match scoring weights: eligibility=0.50, capacity=0.25, product_fit=0.15, preference=0.10 as specified — confirm weighting or adjust for market? Consider whether eligibility should have even higher weight (0.60-0.70) given regulatory nature of financing.

extensions.source_concept: Financing Decision tracking — provider decision management with reason codes
extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no financing decision tracking. Provider decisions, reason codes, conditions, counter-offers, and commission tracking are not captured.
extensions.proposed_structure: Create FinancingDecision entity: id (UUID), financing_match_id (UUID), financing_request_id (UUID), provider_id (UUID), decision_type (Enum: approved|rejected|conditional|pending_documents|under_review|withdrawn|expired), decision_date (DateTime), decision_reason_code (String? from standard catalog), decision_reason_text (Text?), decision_details (JSON?), approved_amount (Decimal?), approved_term_months (Int?), approved_interest_rate (Decimal?), approved_conditions (JSON?), rejection_category (Enum: credit_history|insufficient_income|debt_ratio|collateral|documentation|eligibility|policy|other), rejection_details (JSON?), counter_offer_amount (Decimal?), counter_offer_terms (JSON?), provider_reference (String?), provider_officer_name (String?), provider_officer_contact (String?), estimated_funding_date (DateTime?), funded_at (DateTime?), funded_amount (Decimal?), commission_earned (Decimal?), commission_currency (String default XAF), commission_paid (Boolean), commission_paid_at (DateTime?), demandeur_notified (Boolean), demandeur_notified_at (DateTime?), demandeur_feedback (Enum: satisfied|neutral|dissatisfied), status (Enum: pending|under_review|decision_made|funded|closed|appealed), created_at (DateTime), updated_at (DateTime). Standardized reason code catalog with 8 categories and 17 specific reason codes (FINANCING_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §11.2). Decision lifecycle: submitted → under_review → (approved|conditional|rejected|counter_offer) → funded/closed. Commission tracking for LAWIM revenue on successful funding.
required_permissions: FIN: record decision (provider admin, platform admin)
FIN: read decision (demandeur self, admin, provider)
required_states: FinancingDecision.decision_type ∈ {approved, rejected, conditional, pending_documents, under_review, withdrawn, expired}
FinancingDecision.status ∈ {pending, under_review, decision_made, funded, closed, appealed}
extensions.human_decision_question: Decision reason code catalog: 17 specific codes across 8 categories as specified (FINANCING_EXTENSION_MODEL.md §11.2) — confirm coverage is sufficient for initial providers or add market-specific codes?
